evals.name: new-patterns-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all new TanStack Query rules

assertions.trap: Query runs without enabled check on optional userId
assertions.description: enabled: !!userId for dependent queries to prevent fetch with undefined
SSR: prefetchQuery + dehydrate on server, HydrationBoundary on client
Query key factory pattern for hierarchical invalidation
Optimistic update: cancel queries, snapshot previous, rollback on error
Set default staleTime at QueryClient level (e.g. 60s)

assertions.trap: new Date() in query key (not serializable)
assertions.description: Query keys must be JSON-serializable -- use date.toISOString()

assertions.trap: initialData for loading placeholder (persists to cache)
assertions.description: placeholderData for loading UX, initialData for server-provided data
Fresh QueryClient per test with retry: false, gcTime: 0
invalidateQueries only refetches active -- use refetchType: all for inactive
Loader prefetch: use ensureQueryData + staleTime >= navigation time
